description: Swedish startup addressing elderly care sector challenges including shortage of carers and rising costs. Solution aims to improve business operations and quality of care in growing elderly care market.
business_model: B2B - Platform to elderly care providers
target_market: Elderly care facilities, home care providers
competitive_advantage: Addresses growing market with staffing and cost challenges

varden_fit.rationale: Elderly care infrastructure - potential partnership for occupational health services to care workers
